title: Grimgrim
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Tales1-20}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Grimgrim-TheRebelFour.jpg]] |name=Grimgrim |homeworld= |birth= |death=By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Vatleria]]Following Grimgrim's [[Mission to Vatleria|death]] in "[[The Rebel Four]]," the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ends with the statement that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] will fulfill his wish for [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]] with a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] soon, referencing his [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during the [[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|Rescue of Princess Leia]] in {{Film|IV}}, which takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Therefore, Grimgrim's death must have occurred by [['ABY-BBY' dating system/Legends|0 BBY]]. |species=[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]{{Tales|9|The Rebel Four}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Rebel Four]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Rebel Four hesitate for nothing! When but a handful of stormtroopers stand between us and victory, all I have to say is… It's rebellin' time!|F4-MF|}} '''Grimgrim''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who served as a member of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] unit the [[Rebel Four]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Grimgrim participated in an [[Mission to Vatleria|assault]] on a secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stone ruins|base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vatleria]]. Although the Wookiee and the rest of the unit overcame the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who guarded the outpost, the Rebel Four were plunged into traps by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Grimgrim was crushed to [[Death/Legends|death]] by boulders. ==Biography== {{Quote|What's the plan, Chief?''"''
''"''To stop them, of course.|Soo Rcharrz and F4-MF|}} [[File:Grimgrim_crushed_SWT9.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Grimgrim was crushed to death in Vader's trap.]] The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Grimgrim was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] unit known as the [[Rebel Four]], a quartet in which the Wookiee served under the leadership of the [[IG-series/Legends|IG-series]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[F4-MF]] and alongside operatives [[Falaem Onn]] and [[Soo Rcharrz]]. Prior to or during [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], an [[Unidentified informant|informant]] tipped the Rebel Four off to the location of a hidden Imperial base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vatleria]]. The team [[Mission to Vatleria|sought out]] where they discovered [[stone ruins]] guarded by Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], confirming the informant's intelligence. Upon F4-MF's command, Grimgrim and the others stormed the base and attacked the last group of stormtroopers there. In the ensuing fray, Grimgrim fought with bare [[Limb/Legends|hands]], while the other Rebels fired on their enemies with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. Unbeknownst to Grimgrim and the Rebel Four, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], detected the Rebels' assault with the [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and watched the goings-on from a [[Viewscreen/Legends|viewscreen]] inside the fortress. When Vader sprung a trap for the intruders, [[Rope/Legends|ropes]] ejected from the ground and snagged Grimgrim and the others. The Wookiee was separated from the rest of the Rebel Four and dropped into a pit. There, a barrage of boulders tumbled down upon Grimgrim, [[Death/Legends|killing]] them. Afterward, Vader lamented how easily the Rebel Four had been defeated. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|These pathetic Rebels are no match for the power of the dark side.|Darth Vader|}} Grimgrim was a stocky member of the Wookiee [[Species/Legends|species]], with [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a muscular body covered in blond fur. The Wookiee engaged enemy Imperial [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] with bare hands, hurling stormtroopers overhead. ==Equipment== In combat, Grimgrim wielded a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] in the left hand and wore a brown [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]]. ==Behind the scenes== Grimgrim appeared in "[[The Rebel Four]]," a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story that appeared in [[Star Wars Tales 9|''Star Wars Tales'' 9]]. The story was written and illustrated by [[Jay Stephens]], published by [[Dark Horse Comics]], and released on [[October 10]], [[2001]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/00-458/Star-Wars-Tales-9-photo-cover|text=Star Wars Tales 9}} The character's name and fate of being crushed by rocks resembles the [[Wikipedia:Fantastic Four|Fantastic Four]] superhero [[Wikipedia:Thing (comics)|The Thing, Benjamin Grimm]], who has a rock-covered body.{{Marvel|url=characters/the-thing-benjamin-grimm/in-comics|text=The Thing (Benjamin Grimm)}} ==Appearances== *{{Tales|9|The Rebel Four}} {{1st}} {{Nc}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Grimgrim}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Grimgrim }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Rebel Four members]] [[Category:Wookiees]]
